testcase.name: signin
testcase.system-out:
16:42:59.986 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [br.com.erudio.integrationtests.testcontainers.AbstractIntegrationTest]: AbstractIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 16:43:00.270 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration br.com.erudio.Startup for test class br.com.erudio.integrationtests.controllers.cors.withjson.PersonControllerCorsTest 16:43:01.064 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.images.PullPolicy -- Image pull policy will be performed by: DefaultPullPolicy() 16:43:01.071 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.utility.ImageNameSubstitutor -- Image name substitution will be performed by: DefaultImageNameSubstitutor (composite of 'ConfigurationFileImageNameSubstitutor' and 'PrefixingImageNameSubstitutor') 16:43:01.177 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build what is described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\Henrique\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.15.11\byte-buddy-agent-1.15.11.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: create
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Origin=https://www.erudio.com.br Authorization=Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJyb2xlcyI6WyJBRE1JTiIsIk1BTkFHRVIiXSwiaWF0IjoxNzc1MzMxODIzLCJleHAiOjE3NzUzMzU0MjMsInN1YiI6ImxlYW5kcm8iLCJpc3MiOiJodHRwOi8vbG9jYWxob3N0Ojg4ODgifQ.UsQFxWO8uj9P-hRIzYZKLswZr7sCKF_JX696kuwdWZs Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "id": null, "firstName": "Richard", "lastName": "Stallman", "address": "New York City - New York - USA", "gender": "Male", "enabled": true, "profileUrl": null, "photoUrl": null, "books": null } 2026-04-04T16:43:43.837-03:00 INFO 19096 --- [rest-with-spring-boot-and-java-erudio] [nio-8888-exec-2] br.com.erudio.services.PersonService : Creating one Person! 2026-04-04T16:43:43.843-03:00 INFO 19096 --- [rest-with-spring-boot-and-java-erudio] [nio-8888-exec-2] c.g.dozermapper.core.util.RuntimeUtils : OSGi support is false 2026-04-04T16:43:43.845-03:00 INFO 19096 --- [rest-with-spring-boot-and-java-erudio] [nio-8888-exec-2] c.g.d.core.DozerBeanMapperBuilder : Initializing Dozer. Version: 7.0.0, Thread Name: http-nio-8888-exec-2 2026-04-04T16:43:43.855-03:00 INFO 19096 --- [rest-with-spring-boot-and-java-erudio] [nio-8888-exec-2] d.c.c.r.LegacyPropertiesSettingsResolver : Trying to find Dozer configuration file: dozer.properties 2026-04-04T16:43:43.855-03:00 INFO 19096 --- [rest-with-spring-boot-and-java-erudio] [nio-8888-exec-2] d.c.c.r.LegacyPropertiesSettingsResolver : Failed to find dozer.properties via com.github.dozermapper.core.config.resolvers.LegacyPropertiesSettingsResolver. 2026-04-04T16:43:43.860-03:00 INFO 19096 --- [rest-with-spring-boot-and-java-erudio] [nio-8888-exec-2] c.g.d.core.el.ELExpressionFactory : jakarta.el is not supported; Failed to resolve ExpressionFactory, com.sun.el.ExpressionFactoryImpl HTTP/1.1 200 Vary: Origin Vary: Access-Control-Request-Method Vary: Access-Control-Request-Headers Access-Control-Allow-Origin: https://www.erudio.com.br Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 0 Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate Pragma: no-cache Expires: 0 X-Frame-Options: DENY Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Date: Sat, 04 Apr 2026 19:43:44 GMT Keep-Alive: timeout=60 Connection: keep-alive
{ "id": 1013, "firstName": "Richard", "lastName": "Stallman", "address": "New York City - New York - USA", "gender": "Male", "enabled": true, "profileUrl": null, "photoUrl": null, "_links": { "findAll": { "href": "http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1?page=1&size=12&direction=asc", "type": "GET" }, "findByName": { "href": "http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1/findPeopleByName/?page=1&size=12&direction=asc", "type": "GET" }, "self": { "href": "http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1/1013", "type": "GET" }, "create": { "href": "http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1", "type": "POST" }, "massCreation": { "href": "http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1/massCreation", "type": "POST" }, "update": { "href": "http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1", "type": "PUT" }, "disable": { "href": "http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1/1013", "type": "PATCH" }, "delete": { "href": "http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1/1013", "type": "DELETE" }, "exportPage": { "href": "http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1/exportPage?page=1&size=12&direction=asc", "title": "Export People", "type": "GET" } } }

testcase.name: createWithWrongOrigin
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Origin=https://www.semeru.com.br Authorization=Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJyb2xlcyI6WyJBRE1JTiIsIk1BTkFHRVIiXSwiaWF0IjoxNzc1MzMxODIzLCJleHAiOjE3NzUzMzU0MjMsInN1YiI6ImxlYW5kcm8iLCJpc3MiOiJodHRwOi8vbG9jYWxob3N0Ojg4ODgifQ.UsQFxWO8uj9P-hRIzYZKLswZr7sCKF_JX696kuwdWZs Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "id": 1013, "firstName": "Richard", "lastName": "Stallman", "address": "New York City - New York - USA", "gender": "Male", "enabled": true, "profileUrl": null, "photoUrl": null, "books": null } HTTP/1.1 403 Vary: Origin Vary: Access-Control-Request-Method Vary: Access-Control-Request-Headers X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 0 Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate Pragma: no-cache Expires: 0 X-Frame-Options: DENY Transfer-Encoding: chunked Date: Sat, 04 Apr 2026 19:43:44 GMT Keep-Alive: timeout=60 Connection: keep-alive

testcase.name: findById
testcase.system-out:
Request method: GET Request URI: http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1/1013 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: id=1013 Headers: Origin=http://localhost:8080 Authorization=Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJyb2xlcyI6WyJBRE1JTiIsIk1BTkFHRVIiXSwiaWF0IjoxNzc1MzMxODIzLCJleHAiOjE3NzUzMzU0MjMsInN1YiI6ImxlYW5kcm8iLCJpc3MiOiJodHRwOi8vbG9jYWxob3N0Ojg4ODgifQ.UsQFxWO8uj9P-hRIzYZKLswZr7sCKF_JX696kuwdWZs Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> 2026-04-04T16:43:44.568-03:00 INFO 19096 --- [rest-with-spring-boot-and-java-erudio] [nio-8888-exec-3] br.com.erudio.services.PersonService : Finding one Person! HTTP/1.1 200 Vary: Origin Vary: Access-Control-Request-Method Vary: Access-Control-Request-Headers Access-Control-Allow-Origin: http://localhost:8080 Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 0 Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate Pragma: no-cache Expires: 0 X-Frame-Options: DENY Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Date: Sat, 04 Apr 2026 19:43:44 GMT Keep-Alive: timeout=60 Connection: keep-alive
{ "id": 1013, "firstName": "Richard", "lastName": "Stallman", "address": "New York City - New York - USA", "gender": "Male", "enabled": true, "profileUrl": null, "photoUrl": null, "_links": { "findAll": { "href": "http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1?page=1&size=12&direction=asc", "type": "GET" }, "findByName": { "href": "http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1/findPeopleByName/?page=1&size=12&direction=asc", "type": "GET" }, "self": { "href": "http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1/1013", "type": "GET" }, "create": { "href": "http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1", "type": "POST" }, "massCreation": { "href": "http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1/massCreation", "type": "POST" }, "update": { "href": "http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1", "type": "PUT" }, "disable": { "href": "http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1/1013", "type": "PATCH" }, "delete": { "href": "http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1/1013", "type": "DELETE" }, "exportPage": { "href": "http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1/exportPage?page=1&size=12&direction=asc", "title": "Export People", "type": "GET" } } }

testcase.name: findByIdWithWrongOrigin
testcase.system-out:
Request method: GET Request URI: http://localhost:8888/api/person/v1/1013 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: id=1013 Headers: Origin=https://www.semeru.com.br Authorization=Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJyb2xlcyI6WyJBRE1JTiIsIk1BTkFHRVIiXSwiaWF0IjoxNzc1MzMxODIzLCJleHAiOjE3NzUzMzU0MjMsInN1YiI6ImxlYW5kcm8iLCJpc3MiOiJodHRwOi8vbG9jYWxob3N0Ojg4ODgifQ.UsQFxWO8uj9P-hRIzYZKLswZr7sCKF_JX696kuwdWZs Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 403 Vary: Origin Vary: Access-Control-Request-Method Vary: Access-Control-Request-Headers X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 0 Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate Pragma: no-cache Expires: 0 X-Frame-Options: DENY Transfer-Encoding: chunked Date: Sat, 04 Apr 2026 19:43:44 GMT Keep-Alive: timeout=60 Connection: keep-alive
